chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1141 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 4445/24 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 4446/24 4.For orders on CMA 4447/24 5.For hearing of main case 13-08-2024 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for petitioner. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Office objection (i) is deferred, while office objection (ii) to be complied within one week. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. Learned counsel submits that petitioner is duly appointed as a member of the Syndicate of Shaheed Mohtarma Benazir Bhutto Medical University, Larkana by virtue of elections held in April, 2024. Not only so, the petitioner is also an Associate Professor in GMMMC, Sukkur. Counsel states that as a part of discharging his responsibility as a member of the Syndicate and employee of the institution to make suggestions for the improvement in the institution which led him to write certain lines within the works App group which was solely circulated amongst the officials of the university. Notwithstanding therewith, impugned show-cause notice has been issued to him on account of such submission. Counsel states that while petitioner is 2 ready to provide a suitable response to the show-cause notice including challenging the competency of the Registrar, who has issued show-cause notice, the petitioner is afraid that coercive action may be taken against him in violation of the procedure established for making such enquiry, as contents of the show-cause clearly speak mind of issuing authority.

Notwithstanding therewith, impugned show-cause notice has been issued to him on account of such submission. Counsel states that while petitioner is 2 ready to provide a suitable response to the show-cause notice including challenging the competency of the Registrar, who has issued show-cause notice, the petitioner is afraid that coercive action may be taken against him in violation of the procedure established for making such enquiry, as contents of the show-cause clearly speak mind of issuing authority. Issue notices to respondents as well as AAG for 03.09.2024 and at the same time, while the petitioner to submit a suitable reply of show-cause notice and participate in the enquiry, if any, held in consequence thereof, however no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner till further orders. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
